summary: The frontend uses AG Grid Community (no Enterprise, no LicenseManager) across five surfaces: the Sites list (/sites, server-backed paging+sort), the Site Sync Runs sites list (reuses the Sites grid with a different Actions cell), the per-site Files list (client-side), the File Worker Management page (client-side with live in-flight refresh), and the Organization EDMS Providers grid (client-side, no footer pagination). There is no shared reusable grid component — each feature has its own *AgGridTable.jsx that follows an identical template (Quartz theme via JS API, AgGridProvider with a feature-local module list, suppressPaginationPanel + a custom DataTablePagination footer, column-defs in a sibling .js file, custom cell renderers in a .jsx file). Custom filters use useGridFilter (required in v35+). No global AG Grid CSS is imported.
theming: themeQuartz.withPart(colorSchemeDark | colorSchemeLightCold) via the ag-grid-community JS theming API. Dark-mode tracked by an inline useHtmlClassContains('dark') MutationObserver hook duplicated in each grid file. No ag-theme-* CSS is imported.
licensing: No AG Grid Enterprise license. Grep for 'LicenseManager' returned zero matches. Only ag-grid-community and ag-grid-react are installed.
conventions: Column defs live in a plain .js file (getXxxAgGridColumnDefs); cell renderers live in a sibling .jsx file so React Fast Refresh stays happy
A XXX_AG_GRID_SORTABLE_COL_IDS / SERVER_SORT_COL_IDS array declares which colIds are allowed to sort; onSortChanged snaps disallowed sorts back to the feature-specific default
Custom React filters register logic via useGridFilter({ doesFilterPass, getModelAsString, afterGuiAttached })
filterParams: { buttons: ['apply', 'reset'], closeOnApply: true, debounceMs: 150 } is the project-wide convention
Custom footer pagination uses @/components/DataTable/DataTablePagination with pageSizeOptions [20, 50, 100, 200]; native AG Grid panel is hidden via suppressPaginationPanel
Action cells use forwardRef + useImperativeHandle({ refresh: () => true }) and receive handlers via colDef.cellRendererParams
Grid wrapper uses enableCellTextSelection + suppressCellFocus + domLayout='normal' + headerHeight=36
Tailwind arbitrary selectors on the wrapper left-align header text: [&_.ag-header-cell-label]:justify-start [&_.ag-header-cell-text]:text-left
description: AG Grid Community is used as the primary data-table on Sites, Site Sync Runs, per-site Files, File Worker Management, and Organization EDMS Providers screens. Each feature registers its own module list through AgGridProvider and reuses a shared pattern (Quartz theming, custom DataTablePagination footer, useGridFilter-based custom filters, column-defs in plain JS with cell renderers in a sibling JSX file). The Sites grid is the only one that another feature (Site Sync Runs) re-imports directly.
